Okay LLM + PyTorch people, trunc_normal_, what the fuck! Many LLM inits use it w/ default cutoffs. It's either not doing anything or it's quite broken due 2 issues.

1. The a/b cutoffs in PyTorch are not in std-devs, they are absolute. So w/ a std=0.02, and -2/2 (default arg) https://t.co/wfGR7uS1V7

With the new `hf-mount` CLI, agents can mount Buckets and repos as local filesystems. 

Hence, they don't need to wait to download or upload stuff, and just work as if they were local 🤯
